title: From the goober dome
description: This modpack will give you a spook! This is for an SMP server I am hosting.
body:
This modpack adds plenty of slightly spooky mods, some examples being: From the fog and
the cave dweller. It also adds a few realism mods that change the sounds and stuff. (Like dynamic trees)  Finally there is the game changing mods, like farmers delight, waystones, veinminer.
